title: 最长无重复子串
description: 给定字符串 s，输出不含重复字符的最长连续子串长度。

referenceSolutions.python:
import sys

s = sys.stdin.readline().rstrip('\n')
last_index = {}
left = 0
best = 0

for right, ch in enumerate(s):
    if ch in last_index:
        left = max(left, last_index[ch] + 1)
    last_index[ch] = right
    best = max(best, right - left + 1)

print(best)
